# Pull Request Checklist

## What changed

-

## Why

-

## How I tested it

- [ ] local run
- [ ] unit tests
- [ ] API tests
- [ ] docs updated if needed

## Risk

- [ ] low
- [ ] medium
- [ ] high

## Checklist

- [ ] no secrets added
- [ ] no breaking change, or breaking change documented
- [ ] health endpoints still behave correctly
- [ ] examples / README updated if behavior changed
- [ ] cross-team impacts reviewed (if applicable)
